name: Large Stackable Kids' Wood Bin Natural - Pillowfort™
description: Decorate and organize your kid's space in natural style with the Stackable Wood Bin from Pillowfort™. This natural-shade bin is designed in a cube shape with an open top for easy stashing of toys, blankets and other items. Made of wood, this bin comes with side cutout handles for easy lifting and transportation. Plus, it has a stackable design to help you save space.
